description: Take stylish dressing to the next level with this leather shoe from red tape. The leather lends it a natural finish that enhances your style quotient.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleFour-hole lace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for all-day comfortFabric inner lining for ultimate breathabilityStitch detail on the seams of the toe boxPadded sockliner for instep comfortMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with herringbone grooves and flex grooves Shoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
